name: Crispy Chicken Drumsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. About 2 1/2 pounds, rinse chicken with cold water and pat dry.
2. Combine bread crumbs and other ingredients (except milk), stirring well.
3. Dip drumsticks in skim milk.
4. Dredge in breadcrumb mixture, coating well.
5. Place drumsticks in a 10x6x2 inches baking dish sprayed with Pam.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 hour or until tender.
PER SERVING: 286 calories, 37.3 g protein, 8.7 g fat, 13.4 g carbohydrate, 110 g cholesterol, 2.1 mg iron, 343 mg sodium, 135 mg calcium.
